productName: Diamond Dusted Pre-Roll - Los Muertos DDP - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Los Muertos and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of diesel, blue cheese, and pineapple, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
